agenda.label: Welcome
agenda.title: Open the room with Builder-first framing
agenda.copy: Set expectations for the session and explain why participation creates Creative Value.

agenda.label: Overview
agenda.title: Clarify Bema CORE in plain language
agenda.copy: Introduce LoopLink, LoopCode, and LoopLock without drifting into outdated fundraising vocabulary.

agenda.label: Journey
agenda.title: Show the participation path
agenda.copy: Preview how Qualified LoopLocks, Loop Activity, and Recognized Impact fit together.

agenda.label: Action
agenda.title: Prepare the audience for live enrollment
agenda.copy: Transition into the live invitation and the mutual exchange call to action.
